title: Hit play 'Delwersdorp' to be staged this weekend
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Pentecostal Protestant Church is hosting an award-winning stage play, Delwersdorp, on Saturday 21 September at the Hornlee Civic Centre, Knysna.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Pentecostal Protestant Church is hosting an award-winning stage play, Delwersdorp, on Saturday 21 September at the Hornlee Civic Centre, Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The play was written by Michaela Whaites, and the production is being directed by Nadeem Jeftha.","html":"The play was written by Michaela Whaites, and the production is being directed by Nadeem Jeftha."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to one of the organisers, Marveen Charles, the stage play is a tale about love and resentment experienced by two families, and is set in a small mining community near the Witwatersrand at the beginning of the apartheid era.","html":"According to one of the organisers, Marveen Charles, the stage play is a tale about love and resentment experienced by two families, and is set in a small mining community near the Witwatersrand at the beginning of the apartheid era."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"She added that prominent local actors will perform in the play, and that it is a top-notch production."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Formalities start at 18:30, and the entrance fee of R100 per person includes snacks.","html":"Formalities start at 18:30, and the entrance fee of R100 per person includes snacks."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For further information or tickets, contact Chris Spies at 074 362 1363 or Darrel Figland at 083 700 8281.","html":"For further information or tickets, contact Chris Spies at 074 362 1363 or Darrel Figland at 083 700 8281."}]

images.alt: Hit play 'Delwersdorp' to be staged this weekend
